title: Week of March 30, 2026
summary: This week focused on improving platform reliability and Salesforce connectivity. Key fixes include better handling of Salesforce state and country data fields, enhanced deployment reliability, and resolved connection issues that were preventing some automations from running properly.

entries.headline: Salesforce state and country field handling works more reliably
details: OpsPal now better detects when Salesforce uses special state and country dropdown lists

entries.headline: Multi-step Salesforce deployments run more reliably
